name: @astrical/engine
description: Extensible AI-driven multi-agent planner and orchstrator for local project development

scripts.test:unit: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/unit --collectCoverage=true
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --collectCoverage=false
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration

author: Adrian Webb <adrian@fractalsynapse.com>
